rating_source: Specialist / brand listing; star widget thin or not scraped on check date
include_rationale: Around the first birthday, copying your day means feeding, wrapping and carrying something soft across the room. This doll is light enough to hug and simple enough that dressing stays a short shared job rather than a fiddly costume change.

rating_source: Specialist / brand listing; star widget thin or not scraped on check date
include_rationale: Not every care game needs a doll face. A proper teddy gives them something to wrap, park in the pram and bring to breakfast, which is the same copying job with less dressing fiddle. Shared play on the living-room floor keeps it kind for tired parents.

rank_rationale: #3: second Jellycat slot; classic bear shape.
include_rationale: Second Jellycat only. Choose medium if they already drag toys room to room; small if you want a soft bear that fits the changing bag for grandparent visits without a second doll. Shared play on the living-room floor keeps it kind for tired parents.

include_rationale: Care play can start with a soft friend that already lives in the bag. Freddie is light to hug and easy to clip to a pushchair after a short indoor route. Shared play on the living-room floor keeps it kind for tired parents.
